overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment on a bright sunny day. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses multiple intersections, and passes beneath elevated highway structures in a cyberpunk city featuring towering glass skyscrapers, neon billboards, and industrial concrete architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with neon signage

events.description: character crosses the multi-lane street at the Santa Rosa intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk then stepping onto the crosswalk to cross the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated commercial signs and advertisements on building facades
tall curved glass and steel skyscraper dominating the skyline
tall palm tree planted on the sidewalk edge
large green industrial dumpster on the sidewalk
green street sign with white text reading Santa Rosa

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny street in a futuristic city, with the character walking past neon billboards and a large green dumpster. The character approaches and crosses the street at the Santa Rosa intersection, with a tall glass skyscraper visible in the distance and sparse pedestrian traffic nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk adjacent to industrial concrete wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians and observing the graffiti-covered wall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the concrete wall looking at the street
pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall beige concrete retaining wall with weathered surface
colorful graffiti art painted on the concrete wall surface

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a sidewalk bordered by a tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti. The palm trees and street signs from the previous segment fall behind as the character passes other pedestrians, with the tall futuristic tower still visible ahead and the elevated highway structure growing larger in the distance.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward the overpass structure with industrial buildings on the right

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking ahead under the approaching overpass

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass structure with support columns spanning across the road
security fencing with barbed wire atop the concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk narrows as the character approaches the massive elevated highway overpass. The concrete wall now features barbed wire security fencing, and the space feels more industrial and enclosed. The character follows a distant pedestrian toward the shadowed area beneath the overpass structure.

events.description: entering the shadow beneath the highway overpass, lighting becomes significantly darker and cooler
character crosses the intersection at El Camino Real beneath the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded underpass area then crossing the street at the intersection with highway signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing yellow glasses and beard walking toward the camera

entered.detail: overhead directional highway signs indicating Santo Domingo and El Camino Real
traffic signal showing red light above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shadowy area beneath the massive highway overpass where the lighting becomes darker and cooler. Overhead highway signs for El Camino Real become visible as the character approaches and crosses the intersection, passing a pedestrian with distinctive glowing glasses. The concrete walls continue alongside the path as the character emerges toward the open street beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bright, futuristic city street that gradually transitions into the industrial shadows of a massive highway overpass. It begins on a sunlit thoroughfare where the character walks past neon billboards and a green dumpster before crossing the Santa Rosa intersection toward a distant glass skyscraper. As the character continues along the sidewalk, the open street gives way to a tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti, with the looming structure of an elevated highway growing larger in the distance. The scene then shifts as the path narrows and the graffiti is replaced by barbed wire security fencing, creating a more enclosed and industrial atmosphere. Finally, the camera follows the character into the cool, dark shadows beneath the overpass, passing highway signs for El Camino Real and a pedestrian with glowing glasses before emerging back toward the open street.
